title: FailureGene
description: A compact, control-oriented record of a validated failure pattern. Produced by the Debugger after a repair succeeds, stored in the warning bank, and injected (AVOID-only) into the Developer's context before high-risk turns. Inspired by GEP (Strategy Genes) and Evolver: keep it ~100 tokens, AVOID is the operative field. Selective, not additive — dedupe by matching_signal.

id.description: e.g. fg-2026-06-07-001; unique, immutable after first write

matching_signal.description: Lightweight match spec used for deduplication and injection filtering. Pipe-separated key:value tokens — ANY token match is a hit. e.g. 'file:src/core/** | error:circular_import | task:refactor'

summary.description: One sentence: what failed and where.

strategy.description: One sentence: what approach resolved it or should be tried.

avoid.description: THE operative field injected into Developer context. Imperative, ≤40 words. 'Do NOT X' or 'NEVER Y without Z'. This is what the model sees — keep it compact and specific.

repair_operator.description: The GRASP repair operator that resolved this failure (or 'none'). Helps the Debugger pick the right operator if this pattern recurs.

skill_id.description: If failure is tied to a specific skill; otherwise null. Skill-level lessons also go to that skill's .memory.md.

severity.description: fatal = blocked the story; recoverable = repaired in-run; warning = noted for future prevention

version.description: Bump on each consolidation or manual edit. The schema is editable — do not grow it, revise it.

consolidated_count.description: How many distinct failure events have been merged into this gene. consolidated_count >= 2 means it is a recurring pattern — escalate earlier.

status.description: active = still relevant; resolved = root cause fixed; superseded = replaced by a more general gene

examples.summary: Circular import in the core layer after adding an index.ts barrel export during a refactor.
examples.strategy: Audit all imports top-down before adding barrel exports; run `tsc --noEmit` as the first validation step.
examples.avoid: Do NOT add index.ts barrel exports without first verifying no circular imports exist with `madge --circular`.
